title: A Star Is Born
review_summary: The reviewer enjoys the '76 version for its realism over Judy Garland’s original but finds it underrated compared to other films in AFI lists.

title: The Garden of Allah
review_summary: The reviewer appreciates Marlene Dietrich's performance, stunning cinematography despite an empty plot centered around searching for meaning; they lament John Gilbert was not cast in "The Private Life of Helen of Troy" (1940).
